problem id: b6e4a36d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00011000 -> 10011111
  10010001 -> 10111001
  01111010 -> 10111111
  11001000 -> 11111100
  00110111 -> 11111011
  00001100 -> 11001111
  01011001 -> 11111110
  10110101 -> 00111011
  10010101 -> 10101011

query: 00111101
predicted answer: 01011111
